sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58270" key="kogxoqh/ras" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κογχο-θήρας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58270.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mussel-catcher</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0521.tlg001:42:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Epich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
